_comment: v5.5.0 — kernel-level fixes for the two architectural deferrals from v5.4.8: (1) adjective-as-predicate yes/no questions and (2) comparison detector proper-noun preservation. Both required code-level changes, not just curated data. (1) is implemented as a new `extract_yes_no_property_pair` function in question_shape.rs that recognises «<X (-Genitive)?> <Y> (ме|ма|ба|бе|па|пе)?» without an em-dash separator; conversation.rs tries it as fallback after the em-dash form. New `properties.jsonl` ships 17 curated property facts (ай / жер / күн → дөңгелек, темір / тас → қатты, су → сұйық, etc.) using the existing IsA predicate. (2) is implemented by inverting the v4.77.5 case-stripping order: `try_extract_comparison_topics` now returns LITERAL tokens (no stripping); `lookup` in conversation.rs tries literal first, then case-stripped via the new `strip_trailing_case_for_lookup` public wrapper. Result: «Алматы» and «Астана» reach world_core intact (proper-noun preservation), while «Үкіметтің» genitive normalisation still works for common nouns.
